# Service API

## Authentication

```python
client = Client(api_key="YOUR_API_KEY")
```

## Incomplete Workflow

```javascript
const client = createClient();
...
client.send();
```

## Shell Transcript

```bash
$ npm install
$ npm test
```

## Output

```shell
> build complete
```

## Link

```bash
https://example.com/docs
```

## Unsupported Runtime

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env zsh
echo "zsh only"
```
